summary: Private CJ Cinco operator view for the public brand hub, site surface, and near-term public-safe work.

status.label: Private route
status.detail: The website does not implement login code. Cloudflare Access protects this route before content loads.

metrics.label: Site
metrics.detail: Same Cloudflare Pages project and public domain.

metrics.label: Route
metrics.detail: Not linked from the public homepage, nav, or footer.

metrics.label: Generator
metrics.detail: Built from a curated source file, separate from the local dashboard.

metrics.label: Indexing
metrics.detail: Route metadata and Cloudflare Pages headers block indexing without advertising the path.

sections.title: Current Focus
items: Keep the public hub simple: music, healing, ventures, and contact.
Use this page as a private operator view, not a public content machine.
Finish profile/link direction before activating any posting cadence.

sections.title: Website Surface
items: Primary site stays at cjcinco.com and www.cjcinco.com.
Private dashboard stays inside the same static export and deployment.
No app database, worker login, or custom auth layer is used in the site code.

sections.title: Public-Safe Boundaries
items: Show only curated brand and site-operating summaries.
Do not publish internal task lists, raw strategy notes, personal records, or private service details.
Regenerate from the web-dashboard source file, not from the local operator dashboard output.

sections.title: Next Moves
items: Keep the route out of public navigation and sitemap output.
Regenerate the online-safe data module before each dashboard deploy.
Run the live verifier after Access or hostname changes.

accessPlan: Cloudflare Access protects the dashboard route and nested dashboard paths.
Cloudflare-native Access login is the identity provider.
The Allow policy is limited to the approved CJ account email.
Custom domains and the Pages hostname are gated so direct hostnames cannot bypass Access.
sourceContract: The local dashboard remains the local operator view.
The web dashboard is generated from dashboard-source/web-dashboard.json.
The generator rejects private-domain terms before writing the website data module.
The route must remain absent from public nav, footer, and contact links.
